{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Bastion's Shadow eye
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The crow's nest of [[Bastion's Shadow]] is a giant black eye with a golden iris and narrow pupil.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
